summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
N8 Solutions provides end‑to‑end cybersecurity and compliance services tailored specifically for law firms, helping them protect client data, meet regulatory requirements, and defend against threats like ransomware and phishing.

## Company Details

| Field | Information |
|-------|-------------|
| **Company Name** | N8 Solutions |
| **Headquarters** | 10411 Corporate Drive, Ste 103, Pleasant Prairie, WI 53158 |
| **Phone** | (262) 288-1501 |
| **Email** | info@n8its.com |
| **Primary Service** | Cybersecurity & Compliance for Law Firms |
| **Key Offerings** | Advanced firewalls, intrusion detection, malware scanning, end-to-end encryption, data loss prevention (DLP), security awareness training, ransomware/phishing defenses, backup & disaster recovery |
| **Target Audience** | Law firms (legal industry) |
| **Free Assessment** | Cybersecurity & Compliance Assessment for Law Firms (available via form) |
| **Website** | (not explicitly listed, but domain implied as n8its.com) |
